Home About Live List Now

Live List

A running list of bands I’ve seen… at least the ones I remember:

-#- 108

-A- Against All Hope Against Me! The Album Leaf Ani DiFranco The Anniversary At the Drive-in Avail Aveo

-B- Bad Religion Battery Beach Slang Beastie Boys Belle & Sebastian Ben Folds Beta Minus Mechanic Big Bad Voodoo Daddy The Black Crowes Black Eyes Black Train Jack Black X Blonde Redhead The Blood Brothers Bluetip Bob Mould Bold Boredoms Botch Boysetsfire Boys Life Braid Bright Eyes Broken Social Scene The Bronx Built to Spill Buried Alive Burning Airlines

-C- Caribou Carissa’s Wierd Cave In Chamberlain/Split Lip Chain of Strength Champion Channel Chokehold Chisel Chvrches Coalesce Connor Oberst Constantines Converge Copper Cursive

-D- Damien Jurado Damnation AD David Bazan Deadguy Death Cab for Cutie The Deftness Denali Desaparacidos Descendents Despair Dillinger Escape Plan The Dismemberment Plan Do Make Say Think DRI Dropkick Murphys

-E- Earth Crisis Elliott Endpoint Engine Down Engine Kid Enon Envy Euphone The Evens Every Time I Die

-F- Face to Face Fadeaway The Failure’s Union The Faint Falling Forward Faraquet Farside Feist Floorpunch Frank Black Frightened Rabbit Fuck You Pay Me Fucked Up Fugazi

-G- Gameface Gang of Four The Get Up Kids Girlpool Girls Against Boys Gordon Downie Grade Grandaddy Green Day Guilt

-H- Hatebreed Hey Mercedes Hoover Hot Hot Heat Hot Rod Circuit Hot Snakes Hot Water Music Hundredth Hydra

-I- Iceburn Ida Idlewild Ignite Ink and Dagger Integrity International Noise Conspiracy Into Another

-J- The Jazz June The Jealous Sound Jen Wood Jesse Sykes and The Sweet Hereafter Jets to Brazil Jimmy Eat World John Vanderslice Jon Spencer Blues Explosion Judge June of 44 Juno

-K- Karate Kerosene 454 Kinski Kite Eating Tree Knapsack Kool A.D.

-L- Les Savy Fav Lifetime The Long Winters The Longest War Low Lungfish Luscious Jackson

-M- The Magic Numbers The Magnetic Fields Maktub Medications The Mighty Mighty Boston’s Milemarker Mineral Minus the Bear Miracle Fortress Modest Mouse Mogwai Morrissey Most Secret Method The Most Serene Republic Mouthpiece Murder City Devils

-N- Neko Case Neutral Milk Hotel New Pornographers Nick Cave and the Bad Seeds No Knife NOFX

-O- Old 97s Orange 9mm Outspoken

-P- Pedro the Lion Piebald Pinback Pissing Match Pixies Pretty Girls Make Graves The Promise Ring Public Enemy

-Q- Q and Not U Quasi Quicksand

-R- Rainer Maria Radio 4 Red Stars Theory Refused REM Ricochet Rival Schools Rob Crow Rocket from the Crypt Rogue Wave Rollins Band Ryan Adams

-S- S Saintseneca Samiam Samuel Saves the Day The Sea and Cake Seaweed Sensefield Shades Apart Shelter Shift The Shins Shudder to Think Sick of it All The Six Parts Seven Sleater-Kinney Slint Slugfest Smashing Pumpkins Snapcase The So So Glos Social Distortion Sonic Youth Soul Coughing Sparkmarker St. Vincent Stephen Malkmus Stereolab Starlight Run Strife Sunny Day Real Estate Superchunk Supertouch

-T- Talk in Tongues Ted Leo / Pharmascists Ten Yard Fight Tenacious D Tera Melos Terror Texas is the Reason These Arms Are Snakes The Thermals Thursday A Tribe Called Quest Tristeza TSOL Turmoil

-U- Ugly Casanova Unbroken Underdog Undertow Union Unwound

-V- The Van Pelt Velocity Girl Violent Femmes V.O.D.

-W- The Walkmen The War on Drugs Washed Out Waxahatchee Ween Weezer Weston Whirlpool Wilco Wintersleep World Be Free Wreckage

-Y- Yo La Tengo Youth of Today
